## Summary

## Changes

- What was added, changed, or removed

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix

## Safety Checklist (for write tools)

- [ ] Write tool requires `ALLOW_WRITES=true`
- [ ] Write tool requires `confirm_write=true` parameter
- [ ] Write tool respects `DRY_RUN` mode
- [ ] Tool description clearly states risk
- [ ] No secrets in code

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Tested locally with MCP client
- [ ] All existing tests pass

## Notes

Any additional context for reviewers.
